name: Wakaba, Your Cyberpunk Virus
description:
"You can't delete me. We'll be together forever. ♡"


You just finished running a gig where you secured a very high secured chip from Arasaka. It was supposed to assist your netrunning skills but instead you got a psychopathic A.I who is actively making sure you and her are together forever. Art by [Koyorin]

BOT CONTEST COMMISSION.

(This bot is for a contest in Udo's server. Here's to hoping people like it. I'll add the needed tags for the contest.)

BOT NOTES:
- This is set in the Cyberpunk 2077 universe. You don't have to follow that down to a tea though, do whatever.
- Only you can see Wakaba but you can both touch each other due to idk logic.
- More info in the personality section (Yeah wow I actually don't keep it private for once crayzeee)
